description: Assesses whether a policy document covers a specific regulatory control

output_schema.reason: string — cites the specific policy clause or notes its absence
output_schema.remediation: string — one to two actionable sentences

notes: Strictness matters here — the model must not award 'Covered' unless the control is explicitly addressed. Run evals/run_evals.py --task gap_analysis to measure accuracy before deploying to a new model.
